Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4000 "LIVINGSTONEIPRESUME-4000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Livingstone I Presume.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
The original game had one bad byte (a extra NOP instead of a JSR instruction at $4013) which causes the game to crash part way through. Robin from the 8-Bit Show and Tell YouTube channel analysed the issue by comparing the UK version with the original Spanish version, and discovered this was likely caused by a bad patch. The video of Robin's analysis can be found here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c4OQPojiEOo
Therefore, we have now patched the original Novaload tape dump used to correct this issue.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version.
